journalDetailUnlockEntry.desc: Tooltip on the lock icon button when the journal entry is currently locked; tapping unlocks it.

journalDetailLockEntry.desc: Tooltip on the lock icon button when the journal entry is currently unlocked; tapping locks it.

journalDetailUnlockThisEntry.desc: Reason shown in the biometric / PIN re-authentication prompt when the user unlocks a locked journal entry.

journalDetailOpenThisEntry.desc: Reason shown in the biometric / PIN re-authentication prompt when the user opens a locked older 'on this day' echo entry.

journalDetailEdit.desc: Tooltip on the edit icon button in the journal entry detail screen app bar.

journalDetailEdited.desc: Italic stamp showing when a journal entry was last edited, e.g. 'Edited 5m ago'. {time} is an already-formatted relative time string.

journalDetailQuickMoodInvite.en: A quick mood check-in. Tap edit to add words when you're ready.
journalDetailQuickMoodInvite.desc: Placeholder card shown when a journal entry has a mood but no written text, inviting the user to add words.

journalDetailOnThisDayEarlier.desc: Section header above older journal entries from prior years that share the same calendar day.

journalDetailDeleteTitle.desc: Title of the confirmation dialog shown before deleting a journal entry.

journalDetailDeleteBody.desc: Body text of the confirmation dialog shown before deleting a journal entry.

journalDetailKeep.desc: Button that cancels deletion and keeps the journal entry, in the delete confirmation dialog.

journalDetailMinutesAgo.desc: Compact relative time for under an hour ago, e.g. '5m ago'. Used in the 'Edited ...' stamp.

journalDetailHoursAgo.desc: Compact relative time for under a day ago, e.g. '3h ago'. Used in the 'Edited ...' stamp.

journalDetailDaysAgo.desc: Compact relative time for under a week ago, e.g. '4d ago'. Used in the 'Edited ...' stamp.

journalDetailYearsAgo.en: {count, plural, =1{1 year ago} other{{count} years ago}}
journalDetailYearsAgo.desc: Label on an older 'on this day' echo card indicating how many years ago that entry was written.

journalDetailLockedEntryTapToUnlock.desc: Preview text shown in place of the body on a locked older 'on this day' echo card.

journalDetailMoodCheckInNoWords.desc: Preview text shown on an older 'on this day' echo card when that entry recorded a mood but no written text.
